en: There are five people in our family.

ab: aizaan inaak tastulumah tu tatau uvaaz.
ch: 我們家有三個兄弟姊妹。
en: There are three brothers and sisters in our family.

ab: muskun a saikin mas tama cina siin tuhasnanaz tuhaspingaz minhumis.
ch: 我跟爸爸、媽媽、哥哥和姊姊住在一起。
en: I live with my father, mother, brother and sister.

ab: malauskav a inaak tama, saia hai kisacu.
ch: 我的爸爸很高，我的爸爸是警察。
en: My father is tall and he is a policeman.

ab: matukulaaz a inaak cina, saia hai ising.
ch: 我的媽媽很瘦，我的媽媽是醫生。
en: My mother is thin and my mom is a doctor.

ab: palisBununun a kaimin mas inaak tu tama mais ilumah.
ch: 爸爸在家會和我們說族語。
en: My father speaks the Bunun language with us at home.
We will all go back to the tribe during the summer vacation.

ab: taskun a saikin mas masituhas madamu takula.
ch: 我和兄姊會一起抓青蛙。
en: My brothers and sisters and I will catch frogs together.

ab: madaidaz a saikin mas inaak tu tastulumah.
en: I like our family very much.
